title: Brazilian Flatbread with Masarepa Filling
description: A delicious and crispy flatbread filled with a rich masarepa mixture, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: Prepare the masarepa mixture by mixing all ingredients in a bowl.
Split the flatbreads in half and toast them in the oven for 5 minutes.
Spread the masarepa mixture evenly on the flatbreads.
Top with cheese, eggs, cilantro, garlic, onion, and salsa.
Place the flatbreads in the oven and bake for 10-12 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
